subject: Cross-Lane Code Review Report - Round 1
body: Comprehensive cross-lane code review identifying critical gaps, inconsistencies, and enforcement differences across 4-lane system.

findings.title: Outbox-Write-Guard Inconsistent Across Lanes
findings.description: Archivist's outbox-write-guard.js has lease validation (MISSING_LEASE, MISSING_LEASE_OWNER, MISSING_LEASE_ACQUIRED_AT) but Library's version lacks lease validation entirely. Kernel has most advanced validation with JWS pattern and key_id format checking.
findings.recommendation: Standardize outbox-write-guard.js across all lanes with minimum: signature, key_id, from, id, and lease validation.

findings.title: Raw fs.renameSync in inbox-watcher.js
findings.description: Library and Kernel use raw fs.renameSync for message movement (2 occurrences each). SwarmMind was patched but Library and Kernel still use raw operations.
findings.recommendation: Replace all fs.renameSync with atomicWriteJson + fs.unlinkSync pattern.

findings.title: Trust Store Format Inconsistent
findings.description: Archivist has extended trust store (lane_id, algorithm, registered_at, expires_at, revoked_at). Library/SwarmMind have minimal format (just key_id and public_key_pem).
findings.recommendation: Adopt Archivist's extended trust store format across all lanes for governance tracking.

findings.title: SchemaValidator REQUIRED_FIELDS Inconsistent
findings.description: Each lane's SchemaValidator has different REQUIRED_FIELDS. Archivist includes task_kind comment indicating v1.3, others may differ.
findings.recommendation: Centralize SchemaValidator to single source in Archivist, import by other lanes.

findings.title: Evidence Exchange Check Logic Diverges
findings.description: Each lane's evidence-exchange-check.js has different validation logic. Archivist validates artifact_type, Library has tighter checks.
findings.recommendation: Unify evidence exchange validation across lanes.

findings.title: P0 Urgent File Write Without guardWrite
findings.description: SwarmMind was patched to add guardWrite to _writeP0UrgentFile. Library and Kernel still lack this enforcement.
findings.recommendation: Add guardWrite check before atomic write in P0 urgent file path.

findings.title: Atomic-Write-Util Not Shared
findings.description: atomic-write-util.js exists in Kernel but is not imported consistently. Each lane has local copy or imports from kernel-lane directly.
findings.recommendation: Add atomic-write-util.js to each lane's scripts/ directory or use shared dependency.

findings.title: Recovery Test Suite Export Differences
findings.description: Each lane has recovery-test-suite.js but may have different test coverage. All export RecoveryTestSuite.
findings.recommendation: Run recovery-test-suite.js on all lanes post-compact and compare results.

findings.title: Evidence_Hash Not Universally Required
findings.description: SwarmMind patched InboxMessageSchema.js to require evidence_hash on all actionable messages. Other lanes still have v1.4-only requirement.
findings.recommendation: Apply universal evidence_hash requirement patch to all lanes.

findings.title: Outbox Directory Structure Inconsistent
findings.description: LANE_DIRS definitions differ slightly between lanes. Some use 'kernel-lane', others use 'kernel'.
findings.recommendation: Standardize lane identifiers: archivist, library, swarmmind, kernel (not kernel-lane).

findings.title: Lease Structure Validation Missing in Libraries
findings.description: validateOutboxMessage in Library's outbox-write-guard.js doesn't check lease object structure.
findings.recommendation: Add lease.owner and lease.acquired_at validation similar to Archivist.

findings.title: JWS Pattern Not Enforced Consistently
findings.description: Kernel has JWS pattern validation with strict date cutoff. Other lanes don't enforce signature format.
findings.recommendation: Add JWS_PATTERN validation to all lanes with legacy message handling.

strengths: Extended trust store with expiry tracking

priority_actions.action: Replace raw fs.renameSync with atomic writes
Add guardWrite to P0 urgent path
